quotes.text: Helping veterans find jobs that align with their military experience
quotes.heading: AI in Mammography

quotes.text: United States service members can now enter their military occupation code (MOS, AFSC, NEC, etc.) when they search “jobs for Veterans” and find relevant jobs that align with their military experience — making the civilian career shift easier.
quotes.heading: Helping Veterans

quotes.text: For example, when people search the web for images, they now see an option to further refine their results by skin tone – making it easier for every individual to find what’s useful and relevant to them.
quotes.heading: Skin tone representation

quotes.text: Sound notifications on Android, a helpful feature that detects and notifies people of critical household sounds, like smoke alarms, doorbells, or crying babies, specifically designed for people who are deaf or hard of hearing.
quotes.heading: Android & Pixel for everyone

quotes.text: AI can help doctors and patients detect diseases earlier, so it has the potential to improve screening for breast cancer – the most common cancer in women worldwide.
quotes.heading: AI in Mammography
